    S

    saveDefaultSettings() - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.TestBaseClass
    Saves the default settings for Locale, TimeZone, and ZoneId.
    saveDefaultStreams() - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.TestBaseClass
    Saves the default streams.
    shouldFail() - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.TestDataBase
    Indicates whether the test should fail.
    skipThreadTest() - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.TestBaseClass
    Sets the thread test flag to true, disabling that test.
    storeSystemProperties() - Static method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.TestBaseClass
    Keep the system properties.
    subSequence(int, int) - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.impl.NameTestImpl
